name: Jethro Monroe / Clinical 16-bit v6.0
description: EXTREME COLORBLIND STRATEGY: Return to 100:1 L:C ratio with MAXIMUM constraints. v5.0 chroma-sensitive approach replaced with extreme colorblind separation. lWeight=10.0, cWeight=0.1 makes engine completely colorblind to fur noise. NUCLEAR vibrancyThreshold=95 (only C>95 qualifies as vibrant). EXTREME neutralCentroidClampThreshold=25.0 (C<25 forced to gray - widest dead-zone yet). Explicit forced_centroids anchor (L=40, a=5, b=-45) ensures blue slot reservation. Tighter hueLockAngle=2 prevents hue drift. Goal: Maximum tonal grouping with nuclear noise gate - turn everything up to 11.
